analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Chinese envoy states that Afghanistan’s future political arrangements should be broadly representative. This positions China as advocating inclusive governance in an international context. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) — not mentioned or implied. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — yes: the envoy’s call for broad representation frames China as supporting just, inclusive political outcomes and constructive engagement in another country’s future, aligning with cooperative, multilateral, benevolent positioning. CH3 (epic history) — not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) — not addressed; the statement concerns Afghanistan, not China’s domestic system. CH5 (CCP succeeds) — no performance claims. CH6 (culture/nature) — not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH2 applies.
